home

This is not an about page.

This is a manifesto.

Watch closely.
Know clearly.

Yaqindan kuzat. Aniq bil.

.alomat is not a news site. It is not just an app either. More precisely, .alomat is first a position. An edge against the endless internet. An answer to the noise economy.

01

The internet is endless.
Attention is not.

We open fifty tabs and finish none. We give a headline eight seconds. No context, no order, nothing remembered. We call this the noise economy and we refuse to become part of it.

02

We cannot explain what we are without saying what we are not.

We are not a news app.

We are not an AI tool.

We are not an infinite feed.

We are not everything.

We are an editorial signal layer.

We are a clarity product.

We are your deck.

We are technology and its surroundings.

03

Producing more content is not our job.

Our job is to filter the day's noise and bring forward its clearest signs. One card, one signal. One idea on top. A short summary, a source, an action. That is all. Less is missing, more is noise.

04

Our rules are clear.

  • No ads.
  • No data sales.
  • Not a cent from readers, forever.

The reader is not the product. The reader is the person we answer to.

05

Not a feed. A ritual.

Open it in the morning and see the day. One card during the day, then return to life. Check what changed at night. .alomat is not an app you open; it is a place you come back to. Your place.

06

We are one person.

Oktay writes every line of the technical system and also decides which signal passes through. No ad agency, no growth team, no product strategist. We are us. The decision is ours, the mistake is ours, the tone is ours.

Last line.

.alomat is not where you read more.
It is where you understand faster.

.alomat ko'proq o'qiydigan joy emas. Tezroq tushunadigan joy.

— Oktay

.alomat · one-person studio
